headline: lululemon Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, FY26 Guidance Soft
summary: LULU beats on Q1 EPS and revenues. But shares fall after hours as tariffs and markdowns squeeze margins and the company cuts FY26 view, as Americas comps slide.

raw.headline: lululemon Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, FY26 Guidance Soft

headline: Cramer’s Stop Trading: Five Below
summary: CNBC’s Jim Cramer explains why he is keeping an eye on shares of Five Below.
